name: Empty Collection Loop
description: For-of/for-in loop over a collection that could be empty. Loop body never executes, leaving accumulators and state unchanged.
smt2Template:
(declare-const collection_size Int)
(declare-const loop_body_executed Int)
(assert (= collection_size 0))
(assert (= loop_body_executed 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: sum of line items is 0 when cart is empty — invoice finalized with $0 total
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const num_items Int)
(declare-const total Int)
(assert (= num_items 0))
(assert (= total 0))
(check-sat)
